invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3080（基于ATR 22.8537和近期支撑下移）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3080 (based on ATR 22.8537 and lowered recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破135（基于ATR 1.2476和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-10%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 135 (based on ATR 1.2476 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -10% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.138（基于ATR 0.0016和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.138 (based on ATR 0.0016 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).
